cn.description:
我的足迹MyTracks是一款通过使用GPS数据来记录您的位置的应用程序。它非常适合徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、骑行等各种活动。这款应用程序利用先进的技术提供精确的测量和计算。

以下是您可以使用MyTracks做的事情：
记录您的路线：无论您是徒步旅行、慢跑还是骑行，MyTracks都可以记录您的路径并在地图上显示。
保存收藏的位置：如果有特定的地点您想要记住，您可以将它们标记为应用程序中的收藏夹。
导入和导出数据：MyTracks允许您以多种格式导入和导出数据，如CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ。
提高准确性：您可以进行静态GPS观测，以获得更准确的路标。
轻松导航：该应用程序在指南针上提供路标指南，让您轻松导航到特定位置。
可定制的路标：您可以手动添加路标，也可以从您的收藏位置导入。您甚至可以添加具有角度和距离的矢量。
坐标转换：MyTracks允许您随时在四种不同的坐标格式（十进制、度分秒、MGRS、UTM）之间进行转换。
其他功能：该应用程序在记录过程中显示滑翔比，提供度数或千分度的指南针选项，支持地图上的MGRS网格叠加，并允许您在开始跟踪之前创建路线。
详细记录：您可以在地图上查看您的轨迹并重播路线。该应用程序提供有关您的轨迹的详细统计信息，并显示与每个轨迹相关联的已保存路标。您还可以更改轨迹的颜色以便更容易识别。

请注意，持续在后台使用GPS会快速消耗设备的电池。如果您喜欢我们的应用，请分享好友给予我们支持！如果您有任何反馈或问题，请随时通过miaozhi.ai@gmail.com与我们联系。

hk.description:
Have you ever wanted to become the villain of a story? 
Legend of Keepers is a mix between rogue-lite and dungeon management, where you play as a dungeon manager hiring monsters and building traps to defeat the heroes coming for your gold. Well, the Dungeons Company is looking for its new Boss and needs you to protect their treasures! You have to experience every company’s struggles in this fantasy workspace simulation, from sick leaves to strikes, and manage your team to run the most impenetrable dungeon! 
In this "reverse-Darkest Dungeon", climb the corporate ladder and optimize your strategy to become the most fearsome (and, perhaps, respected) boss in dungeon history!

Main Features

- Deal with the trials of corporate life: mix and match your roster of bloodthirsty employees to stay on top of the dungeon business
- Don’t play nice for once: be the bad guy and make those smug heroes pay with your mischievous strategies
- Manage your resource budget: On top of morale, gold, blood, and tears must be spent wisely in this economy. 
- Being bad never looked this good: see your enemies perish in drop-dead gorgeous animations. Watch out for stains! 
- Diversify your management styles:  Play as 3 dungeon masters - each with their own abilities and recruits - through various campaigns

*NEW MASTERS, NEW ENVIRONMENTS, NEW MONSTERS!*
Unlock the three DLCS : Return Of The Goddess, Feed The Troll and Soul Smugglers. Buy them separately, or together with the DLC Bundle.

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE

- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices
- Compatible with MFicontrollers
- No microtransactions!

hk.description:
Punch your way through the Streets of Rage once again!

Streets of Rage 4 takes forward the Streets of Rage legacy in this retro beat'em up with hand-drawn comic inspired graphics and updated mechanics.

Streets of Rage comes back for a sequel 25 years after the last episode : a new crime syndicate seems to have taken control of the streets and corrupted the police. All you have to fight against them is your friends... and your fists ! Critically acclaimed, Streets of Rage 4 won several awards and nominated as Best Action Games at the 2020 Game Awards.

FEATURES
- Rediscover the classic Beat em up Streets of Rage Franchise with new fight mechanics
- Get thrilled by the Retro hand-drawn comics-inspired artistic direction by the studio behind Wonder Boy: The Dragon’s Trap serving juicy animations & vivid FX
- Unlock up to 5 new & emblematic playable characters and fight your way through 12 various stages to bring back order to the streets
- Challenge yourself in different modes : Story, Training, Arcade...
- Listen to a new Electro OST with world class musicians such as Olivier Derivière and legend Yuzo Koshiro
- Brand-new custom survival mode to the DLC (Mr. X Nightmare)
- New destroyables to help to maintain the combo counter"- Get retro with up to 13 alternative retro characters, secret retro levels or choose the SoR1&2 OST and enable the Retro Pixel graphics !

* NEW MAJOR FREE UPDATE*

- New co-op moves
- +300 in-game improvements
- Brand-new custom survival mode to the DLC (Mr. X Nightmare)
- New destroyables to help to maintain the combo counter

-MULTIPLAYER UPDATE-

- Play online with a partner and gang up to defeat the Y twins' evil plan together!
- Test your strength : hop in Battle Mode and fight your friends across your favorite levels"

-Mr. X Nightmare DLC-
The fight continues in Wood Oak City.
After the events of Streets of Rage 4, our heroes wanted to prepare themselves for future threats. Axel, Blaze and their mates will start a very special deranged training with the help of Dr. Zan, who built an AI program from the remnants of Mister X’s brain that simulates every kind of danger they could be facing. 
With this DLC, get ready for:
• 3 new playable characters
• A new Survival mode with weekly challenges
• Character customization: build your own fighting style with new moves
• New weapons and enemies!o note that multiplayer mode will not be available at launch but will come in a free update after release.

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE
- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices
- Compatible with MFicontrollers
- No micro-transactions!

Crack your knuckles and get ready for Streets of Rage 4 everywhere you go!

If you run into a problem, please contact us at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com with as much information as possible on the issue, or check our FAQ at https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/6-streets-of-rage-4/

收服和養成超過3000隻以上的精美動畫後製完怪獸，成為傳說中的訓練師！並和世界各地的玩家PvP對戰！

收服、訓練和養成超過3000隻怪獸，打造專屬於你的隊伍通往勝利之路！超大型的怪物對戰RPG手遊！

夢幻怪獸是一款讓人欲罷不能的RPG手遊，主打四對四特殊回合制戰鬥，最多16隻怪獸組成一個隊伍。獨創對戰系統和上百種技能讓每一次戰鬥更加熱血和多元。終極進化你的怪獸，釋放它們的真正力量，主宰PvP賽場！您準備好進入夢幻怪獸的世界了嗎？

▶遊戲特點:
●  收集怪獸
• 捕捉和養成3000隻以上的精美動畫後製怪獸！
• 完成終極進化，釋放真正潛能。
• 收集特殊素材，解放秘密技能！

●  打造隊伍
• 用16隻怪獸，研發終極隊伍。
• 特殊回合制戰鬥，擊敗你的宿敵！
• 超過100種怪獸技能，打出致命Combo！

●  成為傳奇
• 征服六個聯盟、挑戰至上四強。超過60個小時的冒險故事！
• 探索六座島嶼和無數地下城！
• 隨著劇情，揭發隱藏在百年帝國維羅希亞華麗外表下的黑歷史。

●  Online對戰
• 和來自世界各地的玩家PvP對戰！
• 超過100支線上任務。
• 參加每週特殊活動，贏得更多豐富獎勵！

hk.description:
"""你是否知道“Schadenfreude”是德语单词，意思是幸灾乐祸？这也是构建《邻居地狱归来》的主要思想。整个电视节目基于对你的脾气暴躁的邻居进行越来越残酷的恶作剧，以使观众开心，收视率高。在受2000年代早期邪恶电视启发的闹剧盛会中变坏很不错！ 

作为《邻居地狱归来》的睚眦必报的主角伍迪，你将穿越虚构但恰如其名的电视节目的第1季和第2季。一路上对讨厌的邻居进行恶作剧，一直到中国、印度、墨西哥，你将确保他的假期成为活生生的地狱。当你在进行恶作剧时，为什么只瞄准邻居呢？你可以让他的母亲和其他旅伴牵涉其中。无论你决定做什么，你值得信赖的摄制组都会在那里，并时刻关注所有行动。你可以让自己狂放的创造力自由驰骋，并观看邻居在绝望中愤怒。请注意不要被他或他的同伴抓住，否则他们会大声呼叫，并且你的电视节目将被停播。另一方面，如果你表现良好，则通过在邻居的生活中造成越来越多的混乱，收视率将会提高，你可能会赢得声名远播的奖项。 ""

邻居地狱归来1和2在一个包中进行重制：28个剧集，以邻居家中、邮轮上以及世界各地几个不同的度假地点为背景

- 在全高清中新渲染的所有图形
- 所有动画的帧率翻倍，带来更流畅的体验
- 使用隐身、技巧和风格进行完美的伏击
- 使用简单的界面和控件
- 精湛的卡通风格图形
- 大乐队配乐 


© HandyGames

hk.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

hk.description:
在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

hk.description:
我的足跡MyTracks是一個使用GPS數據來追蹤您位置的應用程式。它非常適合各種活動，如徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、騎自行車等等。這款應用程式利用先進的技術提供精確的測量和計算。

以下是您可以使用MyTracks進行的操作：
追蹤您的路線：無論是徒步旅行、慢跑還是騎行，MyTracks都能夠記錄您的路徑並在地圖上顯示。
保存喜愛的位置：如果有特定地點您想要記住，您可以在應用程式中將其標記為喜愛的位置。
匯入和匯出數據：MyTracks允許您以CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ等多種格式匯入和匯出數據。
提高準確性：您可以進行靜態GPS觀測，以獲得更準確的路標。
輕鬆導航：該應用程式在指南針上提供路標導航，讓您輕鬆導航到指定位置。
可自訂的路標：您可以手動添加路標，或從喜愛的位置中導入路標。您甚至可以添加具有角度和距離的向量。
座標轉換：MyTracks允許您隨時在四種不同座標格式（十進制、度分秒、MGRS、UTM）之間進行轉換。
其他功能：該應用程式在錄製過程中顯示滑翔比，提供度數或千分度的指南針選項，支援地圖上的MGRS網格疊加，並允許您在開始追蹤之前創建路線。
詳細記錄：您可以在地圖上查看您的追蹤軌跡並重播路線。該應用程式提供有關您的軌跡的詳細統計信息，並顯示與每個追蹤相關的已保存路標。您還可以更改追蹤的顏色以便更容易識別。

請注意，持續在背景使用GPS會快速耗盡設備的電池。如果您喜歡我們的應用，請分享好友給予我們支持！如果您有任何回饋或問題，請隨時透過miaozhi.ai@gmail.com與我們聯繫。

-買斷制遊戲：無廣告、無追蹤、無資料蒐集
-震動回饋 | Game Center | 排行榜與成就

Is This Yours? 是我一人完成的作品，從美術、動畫到程式設計全部自己來。這款遊戲有點胡鬧、有點瘋狂，但絕對是用心製作的。我希望它能讓你會心一笑，也享受那些令人滿足的「找到啦！」時刻。快來接下這份全世界最誇張的失物招領工作吧！客人們快瘋了，他們的東西也一樣。

hk.description:
*線上合作模式現已開放：分享代碼給好友，一起冒險吧！*

《Children of Morta》是一款以故事為主軸的動作 RPG，結合了 Roguelite 的角色成長特色。在遊戲中，玩家將操控的不僅僅是一位角色，而是一個非凡的英雄家族。

在隨機生成的地牢、洞穴和土地中砍殺成群的敵人，帶領擁有各自優缺點的柏格森家族對抗即將來臨的腐化。故事發生在遙遠的世界，卻觸及我們每個人都熟悉的情感與主題：愛與希望，渴望與不安，失落……以及為了拯救最重要的人所願意付出的犧牲。
這是一個關於英雄家族團結一致，對抗侵襲黑暗的動人故事。

-- 完全版 --

《Ancient Spirits》和《Paws and Claws》DLC 都包含在主遊戲中並可在遊戲過程中解鎖。

特色
- 歡迎加入家族！與英雄般的柏格森家族一起面對挑戰，傳承家族榮耀，拯救瑞亞之地免受腐化侵襲
- 同心協力：在這款 Roguelite RPG 中，每次冒險都能提升整個家族的技能和裝備，讓他們變得更強
- 團結力量大：在七位可操控角色間自由切換，每位角色都有獨特的能力、戰鬥風格和迷人的個性
- 沉浸於瑞亞美麗又致命的世界中，精美的 2D 像素藝術結合手工動畫和現代光影技術，帶來視覺享受
- 家族並肩作戰：利用雙人線上合作模式，在每場戰鬥中並肩作戰（此功能將在發佈後更新推出）

精心為手機重新設計
- 全新介面設計——專為手機打造的專屬 UI，完全支援觸控操作
- 支援 Game Center 成就系統
- 雲端存檔——在 iOS 裝置間共享遊戲進度
- 支援 MFi 控制器
- iPhone 15 最佳化（包括 Pro Max）

hk.description:
在這個快節奏的動作rogue-lite遊戲《孤骨勇士》中，失去頭顱反而是戰鬥的一部分。

遊戲擁有100位獨特能力的可操控角色，配合眾多道具，可創造出既瘋狂又具挑戰性的戰鬥。
魔王城廢墟
人類對魔王城的攻擊歷史悠久，此次卻與眾不同。
這次不僅冒險家加入戰鬥，還有帝國軍隊和被稱為「卡倫之英雄」的領袖共同發動全面攻擊，決心一舉根絕魔族。
他們以壓倒性的人數攻陷了魔族堡壘，並成功將其徹底摧毀。城堡中的所有魔族都被俘虜，唯獨一個名叫「孤骨」的孤獨骷髏逃脫了。
黑暗鏡子模式
完成主線故事後，挑戰自我極限，試試全新的「黑暗鏡子」模式吧！

遊戲特色
- 在這場魔族的絕望之中，你是最後的希望！化身為小小骷髏「孤骨」，踏上旅程去擊敗狂妄的英雄們，解救被卡倫墮落軍隊俘虜的魔王。
- 換上新的孤骨，感受失去頭顱的痛快：借用前任擁有者的力量和華服，搭配獨特的道具來創造連鎖技能，戰勝敵人。
- 不死不休：在這款動作滿載的rogue-lite平台遊戲中，你將迎接一切挑戰，直至最終。
- 觀賞充滿活力、風格卡通的像素藝術2D動畫，幫助各種魔族生物恢復本來面目。
- 從埃及的木乃伊到希臘的牛頭怪，甚至《Dead Cells》的官方跨界合作……你能找到遊戲中所有有趣的彩蛋嗎？

專為移動裝置精心重新設計
- 改進的介面——獨家手機用戶介面，完整的觸控操作
- Game Center 成就
- 雲端儲存——在 iOS 裝置間共享你的進度
- 支援 MFi 控制器
- 兼容 iPhone 15（包括 Pro Max）

hk.releaseNotes: 快來加入偵探皮埃爾的冒險之旅吧！
hk.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

hk.description:
利用《虛空穹牢》靈活的牌組構築系統，制定並規劃你的戰略！

PC/行動版跨平台遊戲現已上線！

《虛空穹牢》是一款低隨機性單人Roguelike牌組構築遊戲，玩家可以由此掌握更多主動權。戰鬥中使用的牌組張數固定為20張，在前進過程中，甚至是戰鬥開始前，你都可以構建、切換和修改你的牌組。

在遭遇戰之前，你會提前獲知將與哪些敵人交手，從而精心規劃你的戰略。隨機事件透明化，胸有成竹奪取勝利——你的巧思與戰術將決定你的勝算！

遊戲特性
- 4種角色可供選擇，每種角色都有完全不同的玩法！
- 超過440張卡牌，不斷升級你的牌組！
- 在前往“虛空”的途中，與超過90種可怕的怪物對戰。
- 利用超過320件遺物，嘗試新的玩法。
- 在卡牌上鑲嵌各類虛空石，感受多種多樣的組合效果！
- PC/行動版跨平台遊戲：隨時隨地再來一局！
- 這是一款隨機事件透明化的Roguelike卡牌遊戲，命運掌握在你的手中。

mo.description:
Have you ever wanted to become the villain of a story? 
Legend of Keepers is a mix between rogue-lite and dungeon management, where you play as a dungeon manager hiring monsters and building traps to defeat the heroes coming for your gold. Well, the Dungeons Company is looking for its new Boss and needs you to protect their treasures! You have to experience every company’s struggles in this fantasy workspace simulation, from sick leaves to strikes, and manage your team to run the most impenetrable dungeon! 
In this "reverse-Darkest Dungeon", climb the corporate ladder and optimize your strategy to become the most fearsome (and, perhaps, respected) boss in dungeon history!

Main Features

- Deal with the trials of corporate life: mix and match your roster of bloodthirsty employees to stay on top of the dungeon business
- Don’t play nice for once: be the bad guy and make those smug heroes pay with your mischievous strategies
- Manage your resource budget: On top of morale, gold, blood, and tears must be spent wisely in this economy. 
- Being bad never looked this good: see your enemies perish in drop-dead gorgeous animations. Watch out for stains! 
- Diversify your management styles:  Play as 3 dungeon masters - each with their own abilities and recruits - through various campaigns

*NEW MASTERS, NEW ENVIRONMENTS, NEW MONSTERS!*
Unlock the three DLCS : Return Of The Goddess, Feed The Troll and Soul Smugglers. Buy them separately, or together with the DLC Bundle.

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE

- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices
- Compatible with MFicontrollers
- No microtransactions!

mo.description:
Punch your way through the Streets of Rage once again!

Streets of Rage 4 takes forward the Streets of Rage legacy in this retro beat'em up with hand-drawn comic inspired graphics and updated mechanics.

Streets of Rage comes back for a sequel 25 years after the last episode : a new crime syndicate seems to have taken control of the streets and corrupted the police. All you have to fight against them is your friends... and your fists ! Critically acclaimed, Streets of Rage 4 won several awards and nominated as Best Action Games at the 2020 Game Awards.

FEATURES
- Rediscover the classic Beat em up Streets of Rage Franchise with new fight mechanics
- Get thrilled by the Retro hand-drawn comics-inspired artistic direction by the studio behind Wonder Boy: The Dragon’s Trap serving juicy animations & vivid FX
- Unlock up to 5 new & emblematic playable characters and fight your way through 12 various stages to bring back order to the streets
- Challenge yourself in different modes : Story, Training, Arcade...
- Listen to a new Electro OST with world class musicians such as Olivier Derivière and legend Yuzo Koshiro
- Brand-new custom survival mode to the DLC (Mr. X Nightmare)
- New destroyables to help to maintain the combo counter"- Get retro with up to 13 alternative retro characters, secret retro levels or choose the SoR1&2 OST and enable the Retro Pixel graphics !

* NEW MAJOR FREE UPDATE*

- New co-op moves
- +300 in-game improvements
- Brand-new custom survival mode to the DLC (Mr. X Nightmare)
- New destroyables to help to maintain the combo counter

-MULTIPLAYER UPDATE-

- Play online with a partner and gang up to defeat the Y twins' evil plan together!
- Test your strength : hop in Battle Mode and fight your friends across your favorite levels"

-Mr. X Nightmare DLC-
The fight continues in Wood Oak City.
After the events of Streets of Rage 4, our heroes wanted to prepare themselves for future threats. Axel, Blaze and their mates will start a very special deranged training with the help of Dr. Zan, who built an AI program from the remnants of Mister X’s brain that simulates every kind of danger they could be facing. 
With this DLC, get ready for:
• 3 new playable characters
• A new Survival mode with weekly challenges
• Character customization: build your own fighting style with new moves
• New weapons and enemies!o note that multiplayer mode will not be available at launch but will come in a free update after release.

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE
- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices
- Compatible with MFicontrollers
- No micro-transactions!

Crack your knuckles and get ready for Streets of Rage 4 everywhere you go!

If you run into a problem, please contact us at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com with as much information as possible on the issue, or check our FAQ at https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/6-streets-of-rage-4/

收服、訓練和養成超過3000隻怪獸，打造專屬於你的隊伍通往勝利之路！超大型的怪物對戰RPG手遊！

▶遊戲特點:
●  收集怪獸
• 捕捉和養成3000隻以上的精美動畫後製怪獸！
• 完成終極進化，釋放真正潛能。
• 收集特殊素材，解放秘密技能！

• 用16隻怪獸，研發終極隊伍。
• 特殊回合制戰鬥，擊敗你的宿敵！

mo.description:
"""你是否知道“Schadenfreude”是德语单词，意思是幸灾乐祸？这也是构建《邻居地狱归来》的主要思想。整个电视节目基于对你的脾气暴躁的邻居进行越来越残酷的恶作剧，以使观众开心，收视率高。在受2000年代早期邪恶电视启发的闹剧盛会中变坏很不错！ 

作为《邻居地狱归来》的睚眦必报的主角伍迪，你将穿越虚构但恰如其名的电视节目的第1季和第2季。一路上对讨厌的邻居进行恶作剧，一直到中国、印度、墨西哥，你将确保他的假期成为活生生的地狱。当你在进行恶作剧时，为什么只瞄准邻居呢？你可以让他的母亲和其他旅伴牵涉其中。无论你决定做什么，你值得信赖的摄制组都会在那里，并时刻关注所有行动。你可以让自己狂放的创造力自由驰骋，并观看邻居在绝望中愤怒。请注意不要被他或他的同伴抓住，否则他们会大声呼叫，并且你的电视节目将被停播。另一方面，如果你表现良好，则通过在邻居的生活中造成越来越多的混乱，收视率将会提高，你可能会赢得声名远播的奖项。 ""

邻居地狱归来1和2在一个包中进行重制：28个剧集，以邻居家中、邮轮上以及世界各地几个不同的度假地点为背景

- 在全高清中新渲染的所有图形
- 所有动画的帧率翻倍，带来更流畅的体验
- 使用隐身、技巧和风格进行完美的伏击
- 使用简单的界面和控件
- 精湛的卡通风格图形
- 大乐队配乐

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

mo.description:
在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

mo.description:
我的足跡MyTracks是一個使用GPS數據來追蹤您位置的應用程式。它非常適合各種活動，如徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、騎自行車等等。這款應用程式利用先進的技術提供精確的測量和計算。

以下是您可以使用MyTracks進行的操作：
追蹤您的路線：無論是徒步旅行、慢跑還是騎行，MyTracks都能夠記錄您的路徑並在地圖上顯示。
保存喜愛的位置：如果有特定地點您想要記住，您可以在應用程式中將其標記為喜愛的位置。
匯入和匯出數據：MyTracks允許您以CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ等多種格式匯入和匯出數據。
提高準確性：您可以進行靜態GPS觀測，以獲得更準確的路標。
輕鬆導航：該應用程式在指南針上提供路標導航，讓您輕鬆導航到指定位置。
可自訂的路標：您可以手動添加路標，或從喜愛的位置中導入路標。您甚至可以添加具有角度和距離的向量。
座標轉換：MyTracks允許您隨時在四種不同座標格式（十進制、度分秒、MGRS、UTM）之間進行轉換。
其他功能：該應用程式在錄製過程中顯示滑翔比，提供度數或千分度的指南針選項，支援地圖上的MGRS網格疊加，並允許您在開始追蹤之前創建路線。
詳細記錄：您可以在地圖上查看您的追蹤軌跡並重播路線。該應用程式提供有關您的軌跡的詳細統計信息，並顯示與每個追蹤相關的已保存路標。您還可以更改追蹤的顏色以便更容易識別。

請注意，持續在背景使用GPS會快速耗盡設備的電池。如果您喜歡我們的應用，請分享好友給予我們支持！如果您有任何回饋或問題，請隨時透過miaozhi.ai@gmail.com與我們聯繫。

mo.description:
歡迎來到最混亂的工作：經營失物招領處！你要在一堆超荒謬的遺失物中尋找正確的物品，幫助焦急的客人找回他們的東西——同時還得忍受老闆在背後盯著你看。從耳機、墨西哥捲餅、護照到一隻情緒很豐富的小熊，每一次的挑戰都是對你速度、記憶力和眼力的考驗。
你可以期待：
-快節奏的物品配對玩法（越快還回物品，聲望越高）
-爆笑角色和荒謬請求
-越來越混亂的關卡與挑戰
-越來越沒耐心的客人們
-生存模式：3顆愛心，撐住！
-放鬆無壓的 ZEN 模式
-買斷制遊戲：無廣告、無追蹤、無資料蒐集
-震動回饋 | Game Center | 排行榜與成就

Is This Yours? 是我一人完成的作品，從美術、動畫到程式設計全部自己來。這款遊戲有點胡鬧、有點瘋狂，但絕對是用心製作的。我希望它能讓你會心一笑，也享受那些令人滿足的「找到啦！」時刻。快來接下這份全世界最誇張的失物招領工作吧！客人們快瘋了，他們的東西也一樣。

mo.description:
*線上合作模式現已開放：分享代碼給好友，一起冒險吧！*

《Children of Morta》是一款以故事為主軸的動作 RPG，結合了 Roguelite 的角色成長特色。在遊戲中，玩家將操控的不僅僅是一位角色，而是一個非凡的英雄家族。

在隨機生成的地牢、洞穴和土地中砍殺成群的敵人，帶領擁有各自優缺點的柏格森家族對抗即將來臨的腐化。故事發生在遙遠的世界，卻觸及我們每個人都熟悉的情感與主題：愛與希望，渴望與不安，失落……以及為了拯救最重要的人所願意付出的犧牲。
這是一個關於英雄家族團結一致，對抗侵襲黑暗的動人故事。

-- 完全版 --

《Ancient Spirits》和《Paws and Claws》DLC 都包含在主遊戲中並可在遊戲過程中解鎖。

特色
- 歡迎加入家族！與英雄般的柏格森家族一起面對挑戰，傳承家族榮耀，拯救瑞亞之地免受腐化侵襲
- 同心協力：在這款 Roguelite RPG 中，每次冒險都能提升整個家族的技能和裝備，讓他們變得更強
- 團結力量大：在七位可操控角色間自由切換，每位角色都有獨特的能力、戰鬥風格和迷人的個性
- 沉浸於瑞亞美麗又致命的世界中，精美的 2D 像素藝術結合手工動畫和現代光影技術，帶來視覺享受
- 家族並肩作戰：利用雙人線上合作模式，在每場戰鬥中並肩作戰（此功能將在發佈後更新推出）

精心為手機重新設計
- 全新介面設計——專為手機打造的專屬 UI，完全支援觸控操作
- 支援 Game Center 成就系統
- 雲端存檔——在 iOS 裝置間共享遊戲進度
- 支援 MFi 控制器
- iPhone 15 最佳化（包括 Pro Max）

mo.description:
在這個快節奏的動作rogue-lite遊戲《孤骨勇士》中，失去頭顱反而是戰鬥的一部分。

遊戲擁有100位獨特能力的可操控角色，配合眾多道具，可創造出既瘋狂又具挑戰性的戰鬥。
魔王城廢墟
人類對魔王城的攻擊歷史悠久，此次卻與眾不同。
這次不僅冒險家加入戰鬥，還有帝國軍隊和被稱為「卡倫之英雄」的領袖共同發動全面攻擊，決心一舉根絕魔族。
他們以壓倒性的人數攻陷了魔族堡壘，並成功將其徹底摧毀。城堡中的所有魔族都被俘虜，唯獨一個名叫「孤骨」的孤獨骷髏逃脫了。
黑暗鏡子模式
完成主線故事後，挑戰自我極限，試試全新的「黑暗鏡子」模式吧！

遊戲特色
- 在這場魔族的絕望之中，你是最後的希望！化身為小小骷髏「孤骨」，踏上旅程去擊敗狂妄的英雄們，解救被卡倫墮落軍隊俘虜的魔王。
- 換上新的孤骨，感受失去頭顱的痛快：借用前任擁有者的力量和華服，搭配獨特的道具來創造連鎖技能，戰勝敵人。
- 不死不休：在這款動作滿載的rogue-lite平台遊戲中，你將迎接一切挑戰，直至最終。
- 觀賞充滿活力、風格卡通的像素藝術2D動畫，幫助各種魔族生物恢復本來面目。
- 從埃及的木乃伊到希臘的牛頭怪，甚至《Dead Cells》的官方跨界合作……你能找到遊戲中所有有趣的彩蛋嗎？

專為移動裝置精心重新設計
- 改進的介面——獨家手機用戶介面，完整的觸控操作
- Game Center 成就

- 支援 MFi 控制器
- 兼容 iPhone 15（包括 Pro Max）

mo.releaseNotes: 快來加入偵探皮埃爾的冒險之旅吧！
mo.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

mo.description:
利用《虛空穹牢》靈活的牌組構築系統，制定並規劃你的戰略！

PC/行動版跨平台遊戲現已上線！

《虛空穹牢》是一款低隨機性單人Roguelike牌組構築遊戲，玩家可以由此掌握更多主動權。戰鬥中使用的牌組張數固定為20張，在前進過程中，甚至是戰鬥開始前，你都可以構建、切換和修改你的牌組。

在遭遇戰之前，你會提前獲知將與哪些敵人交手，從而精心規劃你的戰略。隨機事件透明化，胸有成竹奪取勝利——你的巧思與戰術將決定你的勝算！

遊戲特性
- 4種角色可供選擇，每種角色都有完全不同的玩法！
- 超過440張卡牌，不斷升級你的牌組！
- 在前往“虛空”的途中，與超過90種可怕的怪物對戰。
- 利用超過320件遺物，嘗試新的玩法。
- 在卡牌上鑲嵌各類虛空石，感受多種多樣的組合效果！
- PC/行動版跨平台遊戲：隨時隨地再來一局！
- 這是一款隨機事件透明化的Roguelike卡牌遊戲，命運掌握在你的手中。

tw.description:
Have you ever wanted to become the villain of a story? 
Legend of Keepers is a mix between rogue-lite and dungeon management, where you play as a dungeon manager hiring monsters and building traps to defeat the heroes coming for your gold. Well, the Dungeons Company is looking for its new Boss and needs you to protect their treasures! You have to experience every company’s struggles in this fantasy workspace simulation, from sick leaves to strikes, and manage your team to run the most impenetrable dungeon! 
In this "reverse-Darkest Dungeon", climb the corporate ladder and optimize your strategy to become the most fearsome (and, perhaps, respected) boss in dungeon history!

Main Features

- Deal with the trials of corporate life: mix and match your roster of bloodthirsty employees to stay on top of the dungeon business
- Don’t play nice for once: be the bad guy and make those smug heroes pay with your mischievous strategies
- Manage your resource budget: On top of morale, gold, blood, and tears must be spent wisely in this economy. 
- Being bad never looked this good: see your enemies perish in drop-dead gorgeous animations. Watch out for stains! 
- Diversify your management styles:  Play as 3 dungeon masters - each with their own abilities and recruits - through various campaigns

*NEW MASTERS, NEW ENVIRONMENTS, NEW MONSTERS!*
Unlock the three DLCS : Return Of The Goddess, Feed The Troll and Soul Smugglers. Buy them separately, or together with the DLC Bundle.

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE

- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices
- Compatible with MFicontrollers
- No microtransactions!

tw.description:
Punch your way through the Streets of Rage once again!

Streets of Rage 4 takes forward the Streets of Rage legacy in this retro beat'em up with hand-drawn comic inspired graphics and updated mechanics.

Streets of Rage comes back for a sequel 25 years after the last episode : a new crime syndicate seems to have taken control of the streets and corrupted the police. All you have to fight against them is your friends... and your fists ! Critically acclaimed, Streets of Rage 4 won several awards and nominated as Best Action Games at the 2020 Game Awards.

FEATURES

"""你是否知道“Schadenfreude”是德语单词，意思是幸灾乐祸？这也是构建《邻居地狱归来》的主要思想。整个电视节目基于对你的脾气暴躁的邻居进行越来越残酷的恶作剧，以使观众开心，收视率高。在受2000年代早期邪恶电视启发的闹剧盛会中变坏很不错！ 

作为《邻居地狱归来》的睚眦必报的主角伍迪，你将穿越虚构但恰如其名的电视节目的第1季和第2季。一路上对讨厌的邻居进行恶作剧，一直到中国、印度、墨西哥，你将确保他的假期成为活生生的地狱。当你在进行恶作剧时，为什么只瞄准邻居呢？你可以让他的母亲和其他旅伴牵涉其中。无论你决定做什么，你值得信赖的摄制组都会在那里，并时刻关注所有行动。你可以让自己狂放的创造力自由驰骋，并观看邻居在绝望中愤怒。请注意不要被他或他的同伴抓住，否则他们会大声呼叫，并且你的电视节目将被停播。另一方面，如果你表现良好，则通过在邻居的生活中造成越来越多的混乱，收视率将会提高，你可能会赢得声名远播的奖项。 ""

tw.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

tw.description:
我的足跡MyTracks是一個使用GPS數據來追蹤您位置的應用程式。它非常適合各種活動，如徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、騎自行車等等。這款應用程式利用先進的技術提供精確的測量和計算。

以下是您可以使用MyTracks進行的操作：
追蹤您的路線：無論是徒步旅行、慢跑還是騎行，MyTracks都能夠記錄您的路徑並在地圖上顯示。
保存喜愛的位置：如果有特定地點您想要記住，您可以在應用程式中將其標記為喜愛的位置。
匯入和匯出數據：MyTracks允許您以CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ等多種格式匯入和匯出數據。
提高準確性：您可以進行靜態GPS觀測，以獲得更準確的路標。
輕鬆導航：該應用程式在指南針上提供路標導航，讓您輕鬆導航到指定位置。
可自訂的路標：您可以手動添加路標，或從喜愛的位置中導入路標。您甚至可以添加具有角度和距離的向量。
座標轉換：MyTracks允許您隨時在四種不同座標格式（十進制、度分秒、MGRS、UTM）之間進行轉換。
其他功能：該應用程式在錄製過程中顯示滑翔比，提供度數或千分度的指南針選項，支援地圖上的MGRS網格疊加，並允許您在開始追蹤之前創建路線。
詳細記錄：您可以在地圖上查看您的追蹤軌跡並重播路線。該應用程式提供有關您的軌跡的詳細統計信息，並顯示與每個追蹤相關的已保存路標。您還可以更改追蹤的顏色以便更容易識別。

請注意，持續在背景使用GPS會快速耗盡設備的電池。如果您喜歡我們的應用，請分享好友給予我們支持！如果您有任何回饋或問題，請隨時透過miaozhi.ai@gmail.com與我們聯繫。

在隨機生成的地牢、洞穴和土地中砍殺成群的敵人，帶領擁有各自優缺點的柏格森家族對抗即將來臨的腐化。故事發生在遙遠的世界，卻觸及我們每個人都熟悉的情感與主題：愛與希望，渴望與不安，失落……以及為了拯救最重要的人所願意付出的犧牲。

人類對魔王城的攻擊歷史悠久，此次卻與眾不同。
這次不僅冒險家加入戰鬥，還有帝國軍隊和被稱為「卡倫之英雄」的領袖共同發動全面攻擊，決心一舉根絕魔族。
他們以壓倒性的人數攻陷了魔族堡壘，並成功將其徹底摧毀。城堡中的所有魔族都被俘虜，唯獨一個名叫「孤骨」的孤獨骷髏逃脫了。
黑暗鏡子模式
完成主線故事後，挑戰自我極限，試試全新的「黑暗鏡子」模式吧！

遊戲特色
- 在這場魔族的絕望之中，你是最後的希望！化身為小小骷髏「孤骨」，踏上旅程去擊敗狂妄的英雄們，解救被卡倫墮落軍隊俘虜的魔王。
- 換上新的孤骨，感受失去頭顱的痛快：借用前任擁有者的力量和華服，搭配獨特的道具來創造連鎖技能，戰勝敵人。
- 不死不休：在這款動作滿載的rogue-lite平台遊戲中，你將迎接一切挑戰，直至最終。
- 觀賞充滿活力、風格卡通的像素藝術2D動畫，幫助各種魔族生物恢復本來面目。
- 從埃及的木乃伊到希臘的牛頭怪，甚至《Dead Cells》的官方跨界合作……你能找到遊戲中所有有趣的彩蛋嗎？

專為移動裝置精心重新設計
- 改進的介面——獨家手機用戶介面，完整的觸控操作
- Game Center 成就
- 雲端儲存——在 iOS 裝置間共享你的進度
- 支援 MFi 控制器
- 兼容 iPhone 15（包括 Pro Max）

《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

- 超過440張卡牌，不斷升級你的牌組！

us.description:
MyTracks is an app that helps you keep track of your location using GPS data. It's perfect for various activities like hiking, running, walking, biking, and more. This app uses advanced technology to provide precise measurements and calculations.

Here's what you can do with MyTracks:
- Track your route: Whether you're hiking, running, or cycling, MyTracks can record your path and show it on a map.
- Save favorite locations: If there are specific places you want to remember, you can mark them as favorites in the app.
- Import and export data: MyTracks allows you to import and export data in various formats such as CSV, GPX, KML, and KMZ.
- Improve accuracy: You can take static GPS observations to get more accurate waypoints for your tracks.
- Easy navigation: The app provides a waypoint guide on the compass, making it easy for you to navigate to specific locations.
- Customizable waypoints: You can add waypoints manually or import them from your favorite locations. You can even add vectors with angle and distance.
- Coordinate conversion: MyTracks allows you to convert between four different coordinate formats (Decimal, DMS, MGRS, UTM) at any time.
- Additional features: The app displays glide ratio during recording, offers compass options in degrees or mils, supports MGRS Grid overlay on the map, and allows you to create routes to follow before starting your track.
- Detailed records: You can view your tracks on a map and replay the route. The app provides detailed statistics about your track and displays the saved waypoints associated with each track. You can also change the color of your tracks for easier identification.

Please note that using GPS continuously in the background can drain your device's battery quickly. If you have any feedback or questions, please feel free to contact us at miaozhi.ai@gmail.com

us.description:
Welcome to the most chaotic job: running the Lost & Found counter! Sort through dozens of ridiculous lost items to match customers with their missing things. all this while the boss is watching you. From earbuds, burritos, passports  and a suspiciously emotional teddy bear, every request is a test of speed, memory and sharp eyes.

What to expect?
- Fast-paced item matching (the faster an item is returned, the more reputation awarded)
- Hilarious characters and absurd requests
- Fast-growing challenge as more lost items pile up
- Increasingly impatient customers
- Survival mode type of gameplay: 3 hearts available 
- ZEN mode for a relaxing, pressure-free experience
- A paid game: no ads, no tracking, no distractions, no data collected 
- Haptic Feedback | Game Center | Leaderboards & Achievements

I made Is This Yours? as a solo developer: from the artwork to the animations to the code. It’s a little absurd, a little chaotic, and built with a lot of love. I hope it brings you a few smiles and some satisfying moments along the way. Enjoy running the world’s weirdest lost & found counter. Hurry! Customers are losing their minds and their stuff.

us.releaseNotes: Join Pierre on his detective adventure through Opera City where he must find Mr. X!
us.description:
Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective is an adventure puzzle game for children and adults alike! Adapted from the award-winning children's illustration book series by IC4DESIGN and developed by Darjeeling, Labyrinth City takes you on a trip through a fantastic world of underground cities, hot-air balloons, tree-tops and haunted houses. Find your way through each interactive maze, engage with colorful characters, explore hidden pathways, unlock pieces of clues and solve the mystery along the way.

【The Story】
A new case has arrived for Pierre the Maze Detective! Mr. X has stolen the Maze Stone, which has the power to turn the whole Opera City into a maze. Help Pierre and his friend Carmen find their way through the mazes and stop Mr. X before it's too late!

【The Game】
You play as Pierre, Opera City's renowned maze detective, and you must retrieve the Maze Stone stolen by the notorious thief Mr. X! Without you, Opera City is doomed, as the Maze Stone has the power to turn everything around it into an intricate labyrinth. "Beautiful and cute puzzle games are fine and all," I hear you say, "but what about the challenge?". A fine question! In a maze, although there is only one true path to the exit, there are countless trails to hidden treasures and mini-games. So pay close attention while exploring Opera City and you will be pleasantly surprised. 

【Features】
- Explore Opera City! 
Enter colorful worlds teeming with life and intricate details based on the best-selling children’s book series Pierre the Maze Detective by IC4DESIGN 

- Solve All Mysteries! 
More than 100 hidden objects and unique trophies to find, engaging puzzles and minigames to stimulate your brain 

- Interact With the Surroundings! 
Over 500 interactions possible with the characters, items, and background 

- Relive Childhood Memories! 
Each scene is based on a double-page illustration from the original work 

- Original soundtrack 

- Save the World!
 All levels are tied together by an overarching narration that will fill the detectives within us with purpose 

- Speaks Your Language! 
Available in English, Chinese (simplified and traditional), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian

Children of Morta is a story-driven action RPG with a roguelite approach to character development, in which you don’t play a single character but a whole, extraordinary family of heroes. 

Hack’n’slash through hordes of enemies in procedurally generated dungeons, caves and lands and lead the Bergson family, with all their flaws and virtues, against the forthcoming Corruption. The story takes place in a distant land but copes with themes and emotions common to all of us: love and hope, longing and uncertainty, ultimately loss... and sacrifice we are willing to make to save the ones we care the most for. 
Ultimately, it's about a family of heroes standing together against the encroaching darkness.

-- Complete Edition --

Both the Ancient Spirits and the Paws and Claws DLC are included in the main game and available as you play.

FEATURES
- Welcome to the family! Join the heroic Bergsons in their trials to honor their heritage and save the land of Rea from the creeping Corruption 
- One for all, all for one: improve skills and gear for the whole family through each run in the ever-changing world of this roguelite RPG
- Stronger together: switch between 7 playable characters, each with their own abilities, fighting styles and endearing personality

- Family that slays together stays together: use the two-player online coop mode and rely on each other in every fight (available in a post-launch update)

us.description:
Skul is a fast-paced action rogue-lite where losing your head is encouraged. 

Featuring 100 playable characters each with their own unique abilities and a ton of items that can create wild synergies, the battles are as electrifying as they are challenging.

The Demon King's Castle in Ruins
The human race attacking the Demon King's castle is nothing new and has happened countless times before.
What makes this time different though, is that the Adventurers decided to join forces with the Imperial Army and the 'Hero of Caerleon' to lead a full onslaught in hopes of wiping out the Demons once and for all. 
They attacked the Demon stronghold with overwhelming numbers and succeeded in its total destruction. All of the demons in the castle were taken prisoner except for one lone skeleton named 'Skul'.

Dark Mirror Mode
Once you're through with the main story, test your skills and limits in the new challenging 'Dark Mirror' mode!

FEATURES
-You’re the last hope of the entire demon race! Play as Skul, a tiny skeleton on a path to slay the pompous heroes and save the demon king from the corrupt army of Carleon.  
-Losing your head never felt so right: try on new skulls to borrow the powers and dashing outfits of their previous owners and create synergies with unique items to defeat your enemies.
-What is dead may never die: you will not rest until you have faced all the challenges of this action-packed rogue-lite platformer.
-Let your hollow eyes feast upon vibrant, cartoony pixel-art 2D animations as you help all sorts of demonic creatures return to their original state.
-From the Mummies of Egypt to the Minotaur of Greece or even an official Dead Cells crossover… Will you spot all the fun easter eggs scattered across the game?

PC/Mobile Cross Save live now!

Have you ever wanted to become the villain of a story? 
Legend of Keepers is a mix between rogue-lite and dungeon management, where you play as a dungeon manager hiring monsters and building traps to defeat the heroes coming for your gold. Well, the Dungeons Company is looking for its new Boss and needs you to protect their treasures! You have to experience every company’s struggles in this fantasy workspace simulation, from sick leaves to strikes, and manage your team to run the most impenetrable dungeon! 
In this "reverse-Darkest Dungeon", climb the corporate ladder and optimize your strategy to become the most fearsome (and, perhaps, respected) boss in dungeon history!

Main Features

- Deal with the trials of corporate life: mix and match your roster of bloodthirsty employees to stay on top of the dungeon business
- Don’t play nice for once: be the bad guy and make those smug heroes pay with your mischievous strategies

tr.description:
"Did you know that “Schadenfreude” is a German word defined as the concept of finding joy in someone else’s misfortune? It is also the main idea on which Neighbours back From Hell is built. A whole TV show based on playing increasingly outrageous pranks on your grumpy neighbor to keep the audience entertained, and viewership numbers high. It’s good to be bad in this early 2000s trash TV-inspired slapstick extravaganza! 

As Woody, the vengeful star protagonist of Neighbours back From Hell, you will prank your way through Seasons 1 and 2 of the fictitious, but aptly named TV show. Take the mischief from your nasty neighbor’s flat all the way to China, India, and Mexico where you will make sure his holiday is a living hell. While you’re at it, why limit targeting your antics at your neighbor, when you can involve his mother and fellow travelers? Whatever you decide to do, your trusty camera crew will be right there and keep a keen eye on all the action. You can let your crooked creativity flow freely and watch the neighbor rage in desperation. Just be mindful not to get caught by him or his companions, or they will whoop you good and your TV show will be taken off the air. If you perform well on the other hand, by creating more and more disarray and chaos in the neighbor’s life, ratings will increase, and you could win prestigious awards. "

Neighbours From Hell 1 & 2 Remastered in one package: 28 episodes set in the neighbor’s home, on a cruise liner, and in several different holiday locations around the world 

- All graphics newly rendered in Full HD 
- Framerate of all animations doubled for a smoother experience  
- Use stealth, skill, and style to perform the perfect ambush 
- Easy to use interface and controls 
- Superb cartoon-style graphics 
- Big band soundtrack 
- Game Center support
- Full controller support

© HandyGames

tr.description:
Finally, Heart Machine's award winning slash-'em-up arrives to iOS in the most polished and refined version yet, the Special Edition.


► Winner of the Audience Award and Excellence in Visual Art awards of the prestigious Independent Games Festival.

► 14 + nominations among the Best Visual Design, Best Audio and Best original Game categories.

► 9/10 Destructoid - A hallmark of excellence. There may be flaws, but they are negligible and won't cause massive damage.

► 9.5/10 Game Informer - The combination of soundtrack, art, and combat creates a rabbit hole worth your full exploration.

► Eurogamer Recommended - Heart Machine's slash-'em-up is punishing and precise - and incredibly beautiful.

► 9/10 GameSpot - It is more than simply pretty; Hyper Light Drifter uses its visuals to both guide and relax you. The grandest vistas calm your pulse between difficult, breathless combat sequences.

► 8.5 Polygon - Hyper Light Drifter deftly mixes contemplative moments with breakneck action.

► 5 Stars Darkstation - The top-down action-RPG Hyper Light Drifter is an amazing game: gorgeous, a fascinating world to explore, tight controls, beautiful music, and the faith in the player for you to figure things out on your own.


Echoes of a dark and violent past resonate throughout a savage land, steeped in treasure and blood. Drifters of this world are the collectors of forgotten knowledge, lost technologies and broken histories. Our Drifter is haunted by an insatiable illness, traveling further into the lands of Buried Time, hoping to discover a way to quiet the vicious disease.

Hyper Light Drifter is an action adventure RPG in the vein of the best 16-bit classics, with modernized mechanics and designs on a much grander scale. Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies.


Features:

● 120 fps gameplay on iPad Pro / 60 fps on iPhone and iPad.
● Compatible with MFi controllers.
● Game Center achievements.
● Haptic Vibration.
● From each character to subtle background elements, everything is lovingly hand-animated.
● Easy to pick up, difficult to master; enemies are vicious and numerous, hazards will easily crush your frail body, and friendly faces remain rare.
● Upgrade weapons, learn new skills, discover equipment and traverse a dark, detailed world with branching paths and secrets abound.
● Evocative soundtrack composed by Disasterpeace.
● All the content from the original game + more weapons, enemies and areas from the Special edition.

tr.description:
Burn rubber and shred metal in the ultimate driving playground!

Wreckfest is jam-packed with upgrade and customization options. Whether you are preparing for your next demolition derby with reinforced bumpers, roll cages, side protectors and much more, or setting your car up for a banger race with engine performance parts like air filters, camshafts, fuel systems, etc., Wreckfest is shaping up to be the best combative motorsport game out there. 

• Unique Racing Experience – Exhilarating no-rules racing action with defining, once-in-a-lifetime moments that can be achieved only with a true-to-life physics simulation. Witness insane neck-to-neck fighting on high-speed circuits, face total destruction madness on crazy courses with intersections and oncoming traffic, or go for demolition dominance in derby arenas.

• Awesome Cars – Our cars are old, banged up, patched together... They ooze style and character! From old American heavy-hitters to agile Europeans and fun Asians, you won’t find anything like this in other games. 

• Meaningful Customization – Change not only the look of your cars but also upgrade their body armor – Reinforce them with heavy iron that protects you from damage, but also adds weight, which impacts the cars handling. Modify your car to make a robust tank or a fragile but lightning-fast rocket, or anything in between!

• Multiplayer – Wreck your friends in local multiplayer and take racing to the limit while chasing for demolition dominance!

• Challenge modes – Have hilarious fun with crop harvesters, lawn mowers, school buses, three-wheelers and much more! 

• Career Mode – Battle for championships, earn experience, unlock new upgrades and cars, and become the all-time Wreckfest champion!

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

Streets of Rage 4 takes forward the Streets of Rage legacy in this retro beat'em up with hand-drawn comic inspired graphics and updated mechanics.

tr.description:
MyTracks is an app that helps you keep track of your location using GPS data. It's perfect for various activities like hiking, running, walking, biking, and more. This app uses advanced technology to provide precise measurements and calculations.

Here's what you can do with MyTracks:
- Track your route: Whether you're hiking, running, or cycling, MyTracks can record your path and show it on a map.
- Save favorite locations: If there are specific places you want to remember, you can mark them as favorites in the app.
- Import and export data: MyTracks allows you to import and export data in various formats such as CSV, GPX, KML, and KMZ.
- Improve accuracy: You can take static GPS observations to get more accurate waypoints for your tracks.
- Easy navigation: The app provides a waypoint guide on the compass, making it easy for you to navigate to specific locations.
- Customizable waypoints: You can add waypoints manually or import them from your favorite locations. You can even add vectors with angle and distance.
- Coordinate conversion: MyTracks allows you to convert between four different coordinate formats (Decimal, DMS, MGRS, UTM) at any time.
- Additional features: The app displays glide ratio during recording, offers compass options in degrees or mils, supports MGRS Grid overlay on the map, and allows you to create routes to follow before starting your track.
- Detailed records: You can view your tracks on a map and replay the route. The app provides detailed statistics about your track and displays the saved waypoints associated with each track. You can also change the color of your tracks for easier identification.

Please note that using GPS continuously in the background can drain your device's battery quickly. If you have any feedback or questions, please feel free to contact us at miaozhi.ai@gmail.com

tr.description:
A corruptive presence has invaded the Federal Bureau of Control… Only you have the power to stop it. The world is now your weapon in an epic fight to annihilate an ominous enemy through deep and unpredictable environments. Containment has failed, humanity is at stake. Will you regain control?


Winner of over 80 awards, CONTROL is a visually stunning third-person action-adventure that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Blending open-ended environments with the signature world-building and storytelling of renowned developer, Remedy Entertainment, CONTROL presents an expansive and intensely gratifying gameplay experience.


CONTROL Ultimate Edition has now been adapted to iOS. We have implemented touch controls and made changes to the in-game UI and game mechanics, like aiming and puzzles to provide a great experience for supported touch devices. The game renders beautifully through Metal and supports Ray Tracing on supported hardware.



Key features


UNCOVER THE MYSTERIES: Can you handle the bureau’s dark secrets? Unfold an epic supernatural struggle, filled with unexpected characters and bizarre events, as you search for your missing brother, and discover the truth that has brought you here.



EVERYTHING IS YOUR WEAPON: Unleash destruction through transforming weaponry and telekinetic powers. Discover new ways to annihilate your enemies as you harness powerful abilities to turn everything around you into a lethal weapon.



EXPLORE A HIDDEN WORLD: Delve deep into the ominous expanses of a secretive government agency. Explore the Bureau’s shifting environments only to discover that there is always more than meets the eye…



FIGHT FOR CONTROL: Battle a relentless enemy through exciting missions and challenging boss fights to earn powerful upgrades that maximize abilities and customize your weaponry.


CONTROL Ultimate Edition on iOS supports the following MetalFX features:

MetalFX TAAU - Temporal Anti-Aliasing and upscaling
MetalFX Frame Interpolation

Ray-Tracing is supported on devices with M3+ or A19 Pro with 10Gb of memory.

tr.description:
Welcome to the most chaotic job: running the Lost & Found counter! Sort through dozens of ridiculous lost items to match customers with their missing things. all this while the boss is watching you. From earbuds, burritos, passports  and a suspiciously emotional teddy bear, every request is a test of speed, memory and sharp eyes.

What to expect?
- Fast-paced item matching (the faster an item is returned, the more reputation awarded)
- Hilarious characters and absurd requests
- Fast-growing challenge as more lost items pile up
- Increasingly impatient customers
- Survival mode type of gameplay: 3 hearts available 
- ZEN mode for a relaxing, pressure-free experience
- A paid game: no ads, no tracking, no distractions, no data collected 
- Haptic Feedback | Game Center | Leaderboards & Achievements

I made Is This Yours? as a solo developer: from the artwork to the animations to the code. It’s a little absurd, a little chaotic, and built with a lot of love. I hope it brings you a few smiles and some satisfying moments along the way. Enjoy running the world’s weirdest lost & found counter. Hurry! Customers are losing their minds and their stuff.

tr.description:
Run Japan's trains!

No railroad knowledge is required to play "Tokyo Train!".
This game is a brain game with simple rules but requires a lot of brain power.


Customers are waiting at the station for the trains to arrive to take them to their destinations.
Start the trains and transport your customers.

You will earn money for every passenger who boards a train.
Adjust the interval between runs and the number of cars to achieve the highest revenue.
Departing trains costs money. If you send out too many trains and the boarding rate drops, you will lose your revenue.

The operation method is very easy and the rules are simple.
All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time.
As the game progresses, express fares will also appear.

No technical knowledge is required at all.
Both people who like trains and people who like games can quickly understand and enjoy the game.

There are no in-app purchases. There are no ads.
Please concentrate on the game.
Share your operating results on social media.

tr.description:
Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective is an adventure puzzle game for children and adults alike! Adapted from the award-winning children's illustration book series by IC4DESIGN and developed by Darjeeling, Labyrinth City takes you on a trip through a fantastic world of underground cities, hot-air balloons, tree-tops and haunted houses. Find your way through each interactive maze, engage with colorful characters, explore hidden pathways, unlock pieces of clues and solve the mystery along the way.

【The Story】
A new case has arrived for Pierre the Maze Detective! Mr. X has stolen the Maze Stone, which has the power to turn the whole Opera City into a maze. Help Pierre and his friend Carmen find their way through the mazes and stop Mr. X before it's too late!

【The Game】
You play as Pierre, Opera City's renowned maze detective, and you must retrieve the Maze Stone stolen by the notorious thief Mr. X! Without you, Opera City is doomed, as the Maze Stone has the power to turn everything around it into an intricate labyrinth. "Beautiful and cute puzzle games are fine and all," I hear you say, "but what about the challenge?". A fine question! In a maze, although there is only one true path to the exit, there are countless trails to hidden treasures and mini-games. So pay close attention while exploring Opera City and you will be pleasantly surprised. 

【Features】
- Explore Opera City! 
Enter colorful worlds teeming with life and intricate details based on the best-selling children’s book series Pierre the Maze Detective by IC4DESIGN 

- Solve All Mysteries! 
More than 100 hidden objects and unique trophies to find, engaging puzzles and minigames to stimulate your brain 

- Interact With the Surroundings! 
Over 500 interactions possible with the characters, items, and background 

- Relive Childhood Memories! 
Each scene is based on a double-page illustration from the original work 

- Original soundtrack 

- Save the World!
 All levels are tied together by an overarching narration that will fill the detectives within us with purpose 

- Speaks Your Language! 
Available in English, Chinese (simplified and traditional), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian

Children of Morta is a story-driven action RPG with a roguelite approach to character development, in which you don’t play a single character but a whole, extraordinary family of heroes. 

Hack’n’slash through hordes of enemies in procedurally generated dungeons, caves and lands and lead the Bergson family, with all their flaws and virtues, against the forthcoming Corruption. The story takes place in a distant land but copes with themes and emotions common to all of us: love and hope, longing and uncertainty, ultimately loss... and sacrifice we are willing to make to save the ones we care the most for. 
Ultimately, it's about a family of heroes standing together against the encroaching darkness.

-- Complete Edition --

Both the Ancient Spirits and the Paws and Claws DLC are included in the main game and available as you play.

FEATURES
- Welcome to the family! Join the heroic Bergsons in their trials to honor their heritage and save the land of Rea from the creeping Corruption

tr.description:
Skul is a fast-paced action rogue-lite where losing your head is encouraged. 

Featuring 100 playable characters each with their own unique abilities and a ton of items that can create wild synergies, the battles are as electrifying as they are challenging.

The Demon King's Castle in Ruins
The human race attacking the Demon King's castle is nothing new and has happened countless times before.
What makes this time different though, is that the Adventurers decided to join forces with the Imperial Army and the 'Hero of Caerleon' to lead a full onslaught in hopes of wiping out the Demons once and for all. 
They attacked the Demon stronghold with overwhelming numbers and succeeded in its total destruction. All of the demons in the castle were taken prisoner except for one lone skeleton named 'Skul'.

Dark Mirror Mode
Once you're through with the main story, test your skills and limits in the new challenging 'Dark Mirror' mode!

FEATURES
-You’re the last hope of the entire demon race! Play as Skul, a tiny skeleton on a path to slay the pompous heroes and save the demon king from the corrupt army of Carleon.  
-Losing your head never felt so right: try on new skulls to borrow the powers and dashing outfits of their previous owners and create synergies with unique items to defeat your enemies.
-What is dead may never die: you will not rest until you have faced all the challenges of this action-packed rogue-lite platformer.
-Let your hollow eyes feast upon vibrant, cartoony pixel-art 2D animations as you help all sorts of demonic creatures return to their original state.
-From the Mummies of Egypt to the Minotaur of Greece or even an official Dead Cells crossover… Will you spot all the fun easter eggs scattered across the game?

tr.description:
Craft and plan your strategy with Vault of the Void's dynamic deckbuilding!

PC/Mobile Cross Save live now!

Vault of the Void is a single-player, low-RNG roguelike deckbuilder designed to put the power into your hands. Continuously build, transform and iterate on your deck as you progress through your run - or even before each battle, with a fixed deck size of 20 cards required before each fight.

Preview which enemies you’ll be battling before each encounter, giving you a chance to carefully plan your strategy. With no random events, your success is in your hands - and your creativity and skill define your chances of victory!

FEATURES
- Choose from 4 different classes, each one with a completely different playstyle!
- Constantly iterate on your deck with 440+ different cards!
- Battle 90+ fearsome monsters as you make your way to The Void.
- Change up your playstyle with 320+ Artifacts.
- Infuse your cards with different Void Stones - leading to endless combinations!
- PC/Mobile Crossplay: pick up where you left off at any time!
- A roguelike CCG where the power’s in your hands, and without RNG.

pt.description:
Sempre quis ser o vilão da história?

Bom, a Companhia das Masmorras está procurando um chefe novo e precisa que você proteja os tesouros dela!
Legend of Keepers é uma mistura entre roguelite e gerenciamento de masmorra onde você joga como gerente de masmorra, contratando monstros e montando armadilhas para derrotar os heróis que querem seu ouro.
Você precisa vivenciar os problemas de toda empresa nesta simulação de trabalho fantasioso, de faltas com atestado médico a greves, e gerenciar sua equipe para ter a masmorra mais impenetrável! 
Neste “Darkest Dungeon ao contrário”, suba na carreira corporativa e melhore sua estratégia para ser o chefe mais temido (e, quem sabe, respeitado) na história das masmorras!

* CARACTERÍSTICAS *
- Para variar um pouco, não seja o mocinho: seja o bandido e, com estratégias maldosas, faça com que esses heróis metidos paguem
- Viva as provações da vida corporativa: misture e combine seus funcionários sanguinolentos para ficar no topo dos negócios de masmorras
- Ser mau nunca foi tão bom: veja os inimigos serem derrotados em animações de abatimento belíssimas. Cuidado com as manchas!
- Gerencie seus recursos: além de moral, ouro, sangue e lágrimas precisarão ser usados com cautela nesta economia.
- Diversifique seus estilos de gerenciamento. Jogue como 3 mestres de masmorra – cada um com as próprias habilidades e recrutas – em várias campanhas

*NOVOS MESTRES, NOVOS AMBIENTES, NOVOS MONSTROS!*
Libere os três DLCs: Return Of The Goddess, Feed The Troll e Soul Smugglers. Compre-os separadamente ou juntos com o Pacote de DLC.

pt.description:
"""Você sabia que “Schadenfreude” é uma palavra alemã para definir o conceito de encontrar alegria no infortúnio de outra pessoa? É também a ideia principal do jogo Vizinhos do Inferno. Um programa de TV baseado em pegadinhas cada vez mais ultrajantes contra seu vizinho mal-humorado. Tudo para manter o público entretido e o número de visualizações alto. Ser mau é algo bom nessa extravagância de palhaçada inspirada na TV do início dos anos 2000! 

Como o Woody, o protagonista vingativo do Vizinhos do Inferno, você vai fazer pegadinhas através das temporadas 1 e 2 do fictício, mas apropriadamente chamado programa de TV. Faça travessuras do apartamento do seu vizinho desagradável até a China, Índia e México, onde você garantirá que as férias dele sejam um inferno. Já que você está dedicado em fazer isso, por que limitar suas travessuras em um vizinho, quando você pode envolver a mãe dele e outros viajantes? Não importa o que você deseja fazer, sua confiável equipe de filmagem estará lá, pronta para toda a ação. Você pode deixar sua criatividade fluir livremente e ver o vizinho se enfurecer em desespero. Apenas tome cuidado para não ser pego por ele ou seus companheiros. Se isso acontecer, eles vão gritar com você e seu programa de TV será tirado do ar. Por outro lado, se você tiver um bom desempenho, criando mais desordem e caos na vida do vizinho, as avaliações irão aumentar e você poderá ganhar prêmios de prestígio. ""

O Vizinhos do Inferno 1 e 2 remasterizado em um pacote: 28 episódios ambientados na casa do vizinho, em um cruzeiro e em vários locais de férias ao redor do mundo

- Todos os gráficos recém-renderizados em Full HD
- Para uma experiência mais suave, as taxas de quadros de todas as animações foram dobradas
- Use a discrição, habilidade e estilo para realizar uma emboscada perfeita
- Interface e controles fáceis de usar
- Excelentes gráficos em estilo de desenho animado
- Trilha sonora de uma grande banda 
- Suporte total ao controlador
- Compatível com Game Center!

© HandyGames

► Vencedor dos prémios "Audience Award" e "Excellence in Visual Art" do prestigiado Independent Games Festival.

► Mais de 14 nomeações nas categorias Melhor Design Visual, Melhor Áudio e Melhor Jogo Original.

► 9/10 Destructoid « Um exemplo de excelência. Podem existir falhas, mas são insignificantes e não causam granes estragos. »

► 9,5/10 Game Informer « A combinação da banda sonora, dos gráficos e dos combates cria um ambiente complexo que vale a pena explorar. »

► Recomendado pela Eurogamer « O slash-'em-up da Heart Machine é esgotante e preciso - e incrivelmente belo. »

► 9/10 GameSpot « É mais do que simplesmente bonito; o Hyper Light Drifter usa os seus gráficos para te guiar e relaxar. As paisagens magníficas desaceleram a pulsação entre sequências de combate difíceis, que te deixam sem fôlego. »

► 8,5 Polygon « O Hyper Light Drifter combina habilmente momentos contemplativos com ação vertiginosa. »

► 5 Estrelas Darkstation « O RPG de ação, visto de cima, Hyper Light Drifter é um jogo espantoso: lindo, um mundo fascinante para explorar, controlos sem falhas, música magnífica e a confiança no jogador que o fará descobrir as coisas sozinho. »


Os ecos de um passado sombrio e violento ressoam através das terras selvagens, repletas de tesouros e sangue. Os Drifters deste mundo são os colecionadores de conhecimentos esquecidos, tecnologias perdidas e histórias desfeitas. O nosso Drifter é assombrado por uma doença insaciável, viajando pelas terras do Tempo Sepultado, na esperança de descobrir uma forma de apaziguar a doença cruel.

Hyper Light Drifter é um RPG de ação/aventura ao estilo dos melhores clássicos de 16 bits, com mecânicas modernizadas e gráficos numa escala grandiosamente superior. Explora um vasto mundo deslumbrante e em ruínas, repleto de perigos e tecnologias esquecidas.


Características:

● Jogabilidade de 120 fps no iPad Pro / 60 fps no iPhone e iPad.
● Compatível com controladores MFi.
● Conquistas no Game Center.
● Vibração táctil.
● Desde as personagens aos elementos subtis do cenário, tudo foi concebido à mão com o maior dos afetos.
● Fácil de aprender, difícil de dominar; os inimigos são cruéis e numerosos, os perigos podem esmagar facilmente o teu corpo frágil e os rostos amigáveis são raros.
● Melhora as armas, aprende novas habilidades, descobre equipamentos e atravessa um mundo sombrio e detalhado onde abundam encruzilhadas e segredos.
● Banda sonora evocativa criada por Disasterpeace.
● Todo o conteúdo do jogo original + mais armas, inimigos e áreas da Special Edition.

pt.description:
Queime borracha e destrua metal no maior circuito de corrida livre que há!

Wreckfest possui uma paulada de opções de melhorias e personalizações. Você pode se preparar para a próxima corrida de demolição com para-choques reforçados, santantônios, protetores laterais e muito mais, ou pode preparar o carro para uma Corrida Lata Velha com peças de desempenho de motor como filtros de ar, árvores de cames, sistemas de combustível etc. Wreckfest está se tornando o melhor jogo de combate motorizado que existe. 

• Experiência de Corrida Única - Corridas de ação sem regras e de tirar o fôlego, com momentos únicos possíveis apenas graças à simulação física realista. Participe de batalhas em circuitos de alta velocidade, enfrente a possibilidade de destruição total em rotas malucas com intersecções e tráfego ou parta para a dominação nas arenas de destruição.

• Carros Incríveis - Nossos carros são velhos, acabados e remendados, mas cheios de estilo! Dos velhos guerreiros americanos aos ágeis europeus, passando pelos asiáticos divertidos! Não tem nada como isso em outros jogos. 

• Personalização Relevante - Altere não só a aparência do carro, mas também a blindagem. Reforce-os com placas de ferro pesadas que protegem contra dano, mas aumentam o peso, impactando o controle. Modifique o carro para que se torne um tanque robusto, um foguete frágil e veloz ou qualquer coisa entre esses extremos!

• Multijogador - Destrua seus amigos no modo multijogador local e corra no limite enquanto os persegue para dominar na demolição!

• Modos Desafiadores - Divirta-se com colheitadeiras, cortadores de grama, ônibus escolares, triciclos e muito mais! 

• Modo Carreira - Batalhe em campeonatos, ganhe experiência, desbloqueie novas melhorias e carros e torne-se o campeão máximo de Wreckfest!

Abra caminho no soco pelas ruas de Streets of Rage mais uma vez!

Streets of Rage 4 traz o legado do jogo neste beat'em rretrô, com gráficos inspirados em quadrinhos desenhados à mão e mecânica atualizada.

Streets of Rage volta para uma sequência 25 anos após o último episódio: um novo sindicato do crime parece ter assumido o controle das ruas e corrompido a polícia. Tudo que você tem disponível para lutar contra eles são seus amigos... e seus punhos! Streets of Rage 4 foi aclamado pela crítica e ganhou vários prêmios inclusive foi indicado como Melhor Jogo de Ação no Game Awards 2020.

CARACTERÍSTICAS

pt.description:
MyTracks is an app that helps you keep track of your location using GPS data. It's perfect for various activities like hiking, running, walking, biking, and more. This app uses advanced technology to provide precise measurements and calculations.

Here's what you can do with MyTracks:
- Track your route: Whether you're hiking, running, or cycling, MyTracks can record your path and show it on a map.
- Save favorite locations: If there are specific places you want to remember, you can mark them as favorites in the app.
- Import and export data: MyTracks allows you to import and export data in various formats such as CSV, GPX, KML, and KMZ.
- Improve accuracy: You can take static GPS observations to get more accurate waypoints for your tracks.
- Easy navigation: The app provides a waypoint guide on the compass, making it easy for you to navigate to specific locations.
- Customizable waypoints: You can add waypoints manually or import them from your favorite locations. You can even add vectors with angle and distance.
- Coordinate conversion: MyTracks allows you to convert between four different coordinate formats (Decimal, DMS, MGRS, UTM) at any time.
- Additional features: The app displays glide ratio during recording, offers compass options in degrees or mils, supports MGRS Grid overlay on the map, and allows you to create routes to follow before starting your track.
- Detailed records: You can view your tracks on a map and replay the route. The app provides detailed statistics about your track and displays the saved waypoints associated with each track. You can also change the color of your tracks for easier identification.

Please note that using GPS continuously in the background can drain your device's battery quickly. If you have any feedback or questions, please feel free to contact us at miaozhi.ai@gmail.com

pt.description:
A corruptive presence has invaded the Federal Bureau of Control… Only you have the power to stop it. The world is now your weapon in an epic fight to annihilate an ominous enemy through deep and unpredictable environments. Containment has failed, humanity is at stake. Will you regain control?


Winner of over 80 awards, CONTROL is a visually stunning third-person action-adventure that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Blending open-ended environments with the signature world-building and storytelling of renowned developer, Remedy Entertainment, CONTROL presents an expansive and intensely gratifying gameplay experience.


CONTROL Ultimate Edition has now been adapted to iOS. We have implemented touch controls and made changes to the in-game UI and game mechanics, like aiming and puzzles to provide a great experience for supported touch devices. The game renders beautifully through Metal and supports Ray Tracing on supported hardware.



Key features


UNCOVER THE MYSTERIES: Can you handle the bureau’s dark secrets? Unfold an epic supernatural struggle, filled with unexpected characters and bizarre events, as you search for your missing brother, and discover the truth that has brought you here.



EVERYTHING IS YOUR WEAPON: Unleash destruction through transforming weaponry and telekinetic powers. Discover new ways to annihilate your enemies as you harness powerful abilities to turn everything around you into a lethal weapon.



EXPLORE A HIDDEN WORLD: Delve deep into the ominous expanses of a secretive government agency. Explore the Bureau’s shifting environments only to discover that there is always more than meets the eye…



FIGHT FOR CONTROL: Battle a relentless enemy through exciting missions and challenging boss fights to earn powerful upgrades that maximize abilities and customize your weaponry.


CONTROL Ultimate Edition on iOS supports the following MetalFX features:

MetalFX TAAU - Temporal Anti-Aliasing and upscaling
MetalFX Frame Interpolation

Ray-Tracing is supported on devices with M3+ or A19 Pro with 10Gb of memory.

pt.description:
Welcome to the most chaotic job: running the Lost & Found counter! Sort through dozens of ridiculous lost items to match customers with their missing things. all this while the boss is watching you. From earbuds, burritos, passports  and a suspiciously emotional teddy bear, every request is a test of speed, memory and sharp eyes.

What to expect?
- Fast-paced item matching (the faster an item is returned, the more reputation awarded)
- Hilarious characters and absurd requests
- Fast-growing challenge as more lost items pile up
- Increasingly impatient customers
- Survival mode type of gameplay: 3 hearts available 
- ZEN mode for a relaxing, pressure-free experience
- A paid game: no ads, no tracking, no distractions, no data collected 
- Haptic Feedback | Game Center | Leaderboards & Achievements

I made Is This Yours? as a solo developer: from the artwork to the animations to the code. It’s a little absurd, a little chaotic, and built with a lot of love. I hope it brings you a few smiles and some satisfying moments along the way. Enjoy running the world’s weirdest lost & found counter. Hurry! Customers are losing their minds and their stuff.

pt.description:
Façam os comboios japoneses funcionar!

Não é necessário nenhum conhecimento ferroviário para jogar "Tokyo Train!".
Este jogo é um jogo de cérebro com regras simples, mas requer muito poder cerebral.

Os clientes esperam na estação que os comboios cheguem para os levar aos seus destinos.
Comece os comboios e transporte os seus clientes.

Ganharão dinheiro por cada passageiro que embarcar num comboio.
Ajuste o intervalo entre as viagens e o número de vagões para alcançar a maior receita.
A partida dos comboios custa dinheiro. Se enviar demasiados comboios e a taxa de embarque baixar, perderá as suas receitas.

O método de operação é muito fácil e as regras são simples.
Só tem de ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem na melhor altura.
À medida que o jogo avança, as tarifas expressas também aparecerão.

Não é necessário qualquer conhecimento técnico.
Tanto as pessoas que gostam de comboios como as pessoas que gostam de jogos podem rapidamente compreender e desfrutar do jogo.

Não há compras em espera. Não há anúncios.
Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo.
Partilhe os seus resultados operacionais nas redes sociais.

pt.releaseNotes: Join Pierre on his detective adventure through Opera City where he must find Mr. X!
pt.description:
Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective is an adventure puzzle game for children and adults alike! Adapted from the award-winning children's illustration book series by IC4DESIGN and developed by Darjeeling, Labyrinth City takes you on a trip through a fantastic world of underground cities, hot-air balloons, tree-tops and haunted houses. Find your way through each interactive maze, engage with colorful characters, explore hidden pathways, unlock pieces of clues and solve the mystery along the way.

【The Story】
A new case has arrived for Pierre the Maze Detective! Mr. X has stolen the Maze Stone, which has the power to turn the whole Opera City into a maze. Help Pierre and his friend Carmen find their way through the mazes and stop Mr. X before it's too late!

【The Game】
You play as Pierre, Opera City's renowned maze detective, and you must retrieve the Maze Stone stolen by the notorious thief Mr. X! Without you, Opera City is doomed, as the Maze Stone has the power to turn everything around it into an intricate labyrinth. "Beautiful and cute puzzle games are fine and all," I hear you say, "but what about the challenge?". A fine question! In a maze, although there is only one true path to the exit, there are countless trails to hidden treasures and mini-games. So pay close attention while exploring Opera City and you will be pleasantly surprised. 

【Features】
- Explore Opera City! 
Enter colorful worlds teeming with life and intricate details based on the best-selling children’s book series Pierre the Maze Detective by IC4DESIGN 

- Solve All Mysteries! 
More than 100 hidden objects and unique trophies to find, engaging puzzles and minigames to stimulate your brain 

- Interact With the Surroundings! 
Over 500 interactions possible with the characters, items, and background 

- Relive Childhood Memories! 
Each scene is based on a double-page illustration from the original work 

- Original soundtrack 

- Save the World!
 All levels are tied together by an overarching narration that will fill the detectives within us with purpose 

- Speaks Your Language! 
Available in English, Chinese (simplified and traditional), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian

pt.description:
*O cooperativo on-line já está disponível: compartilhe um código e jogue com um amigo!*

Children of Morta é um RPG de ação baseado em história, com uma abordagem roguelite ao desenvolvimento de personagens, no qual você não joga com um único personagem, mas com uma família inteira e extraordinária de heróis.

Derrote hordas de inimigos em masmorras, cavernas e terras geradas processualmente e lidere a família Bergson, com todas as suas falhas e virtudes, contra a corrupção que se aproxima. A história se passa em uma terra distante, mas lida com temas e emoções comuns a todos nós: amor e esperança, saudade e incerteza, perda... e o sacrifício que estamos dispostos a fazer para salvar quem mais amamos.
No fim, trata-se de uma família de heróis unida contra a escuridão iminente.

-- Edição Completa --

Tanto o DLC Ancient Spirits quanto o Paws and Claws estão incluídos no jogo principal e disponíveis conforme você joga.

CARACTERÍSTICAS
- Boas-vindas à família! Junte-se aos heroicos Bergsons em provações para honrar sua herança e salvar a terra de Rea da crescente corrupção
- Um por todos e todos por um! Melhore as habilidades e os equipamentos de toda a família a cada partida no mundo em constante mudança deste RPG roguelite
- A união faz a força! Alterne entre 7 personagens jogáveis, cada um com as próprias habilidades, estilos de luta e personalidade cativante
- Mergulhe no belo e mortal mundo de Rea feito em pixel art 2D, misturando animações feitas à mão com técnicas modernas de iluminação
- Família que mata unida permanece unida: use o modo cooperativo on-line para dois jogadores e confiem um no outro em todas as lutas (disponível em uma atualização pós-lançamento)

pt.description:
Skul é um roguelite de ação em ritmo acelerado, onde incentiva-se a perder a cabeça.

Com 100 personagens jogáveis, cada um com as próprias habilidades exclusivas e muitos itens que podem criar sinergias incríveis, as batalhas são tão eletrizantes quanto desafiadoras.

O Castelo do Rei Demônio em ruínas
O ataque da raça humana ao castelo do Rei Demônio não é novidade e já aconteceu inúmeras vezes.
Desta vez, o que difere é que os aventureiros decidiram unir forças com o Exército Imperial e escolheram o “Herói de Caerleon” para liderar um ataque total na esperança de exterminar os demônios de uma vez por todas.
Eles atacaram a fortaleza do Demônio com números esmagadores e conseguiram destruí-lo totalmente. Todos os demônios do castelo viraram prisioneiros, exceto um esqueleto solitário chamado “Skul”.

Modo Espelho Sombrio
Ao terminar a história principal, teste suas habilidades e seus limites no novo e desafiador modo “Espelho Sombrio”!

CARACTERÍSTICAS
- Você é a última esperança de toda a raça demoníaca! Jogue como Skul, um esqueletinho no caminho para matar os heróis pomposos e salvar o rei demônio do exército corrupto de Caerleon.
- Perder a cabeça nunca foi tão certo: experimente crânios novos para pegar emprestado os poderes e as roupas elegantes dos donos anteriores e crie sinergias com itens exclusivos para derrotar os inimigos.
- O que está morto não pode morrer: você não descansará até enfrentar todos os desafios deste jogo de plataforma roguelite cheio de ação.
- Deixe seus olhos vazios deleitarem-se com animações 2D vibrantes de pixel art enquanto você ajuda todos os tipos de criaturas demoníacas a retornar ao estado original.
- Das múmias do Egito ao Minotauro da Grécia, ou até mesmo um crossover oficial de Dead Cells… Será que você consegue encontrar todos os easter eggs divertidos espalhados pelo jogo?

CUIDADOSAMENTE REPROJETADO PARA DISPOSITIVOS MÓVEIS
- Interface renovada – IU exclusiva para dispositivos móveis com controle de toque completo
- Conquistas do Game Center
- Armazenamento na nuvem – Compartilhe o progresso entre dispositivos iOS
- Compatível com controles MFi
- Otimização do iPhone 15 (incluindo Pro Max)

pt.description:
Crie e planeje sua estratégia com a construção de baralho dinâmica do Vault of the Void!

Crossplay entre PC/Móvel agora está disponível!

Vault of the Void é um jogo para um jogador, com pouca aleatoriedade (RNG), feito para deixar o poder em suas mãos. Construa, transforme e itere o seu baralho continuamente enquanto avança em sua partida - ou até mesmo antes de cada batalha, com um baralho contendo exatamente 20 cartas antes de cada luta.

Preveja quais inimigos você irá enfrentar antes de cada encontro, te permitindo a chance de planejar cuidadosamente sua estratégia. Sem eventos aleatórios, o seu sucesso está em suas mãos - e sua criatividade e habilidade definem suas chances de vitória!

CARACTERÍSTICAS
- Escolha entre 4 classes diferentes, cada uma com um estilo de jogo completamente diferente!
- Transforme constantemente o seu baralho com 440+ cartas diferentes!
- Batalhe 90+ monstros assustadores enquanto embarca em seu caminho para O Vazio.
- Mude seu estilo de jogo com 320+ Artefatos.
- Infunda suas cartas com Pedras do Vazio diferentes - levando a combinações intermináveis!
- Crossplay entre PC/Móvel: continue de onde parou a qualquer momento!
- Um jogo de cartas colecionável roguelike onde o poder está em suas mãos, e sem RNG.
